nodes.name: FUNDING.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Sponsors funding configuration linking the project to the maintainer's GitHub profile and the ecc.tools custom donation URL.

nodes.name: PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md
nodes.summary: GitHub pull request template with six structured sections covering change description, motivation, testing evidence, change type classification, security and quality checklist, and documentation reminders.

nodes.name: copilot-instructions.md
nodes.summary: Always-active GitHub Copilot Chat baseline instructions for the ECC codebase, covering core workflow (research-first, TDD, conventional commits), coding standards, security checklists, testing requirements, and a reference to the prompt library in `.github/prompts/`.
nodes.languageNotes: GitHub Copilot reads this file automatically; it mirrors ECC's own CLAUDE.md conventions so the harness behaves consistently whether driven by Claude or Copilot.

nodes.name: dependabot.yml
nodes.summary: Dependabot configuration scheduling weekly automated dependency updates across five package ecosystems — npm (root), pip (root and skills/skill-comply), and Cargo (ecc2/) — with grouped minor/patch and security update strategies.
nodes.languageNotes: Five separate update blocks cover the full polyglot stack: Node.js, Python (two directories), and Rust, ensuring no ecosystem is left unmonitored.

nodes.name: release.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub release changelog configuration that categorizes pull requests into four sections — Core Harness, Reliability & Bug Fixes, Docs & Guides, and Tooling & CI — by label, with a skip-changelog exclusion label.
